content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a program that prints a motivational message with blank lines for better readability. You will use the newline character (`\n`) within the `print()` function to insert these blank lines directly, making your output more organized.

You should format your output as follows:
content.outputFormat:
Print exactly the following text (including blank line):
Learn, Code, Repeat.

Keep practicing every day!

sampleTestCases.output:
Learn, Code, Repeat.

Keep practicing every day!
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the motivational message with a blank line as required.

sampleTestCases.output:
Learn, Code, Repeat.

Keep practicing every day!
sampleTestCases.explanation: The output is independent of any input.

Keep practicing every day!

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints the required motivational message. Use a newline character (\n) to create a blank line between the two sentences.

code.Java: public class Main{public static void main(String[]args){System.out.print("Learn, Code, Repeat.\n\nKeep practicing every day!");}}
code.Python3: print("Learn, Code, Repeat.\n\nKeep practicing every day!")
code.JavaScript: const msg="Learn, Code, Repeat.\n\nKeep practicing every day!";console.log(msg);
